summary: Start M7 core action-loop UX recovery after systemic interaction recovery planning and closure entered origin/main. The task repairs the playable loop by making phase, obligation handling, and appointment preview/confirmation feedback explicit.

tests_run.result: Started from clean main after PR #216 closure merge, then created codex/m7-core-action-loop-ux.

decisions.decision: Treat the product-owner feedback as systemic interaction failure, not copy-only or art-only polish.
Implement a visible phase/action loop: current phase, main unresolved decision, direct action entry, preview, confirm, and result feedback.
Do not change authoritative simulation, protocol, save, content-source, final art, or manual node battle scope.

risks.summary: A richer action loop can accidentally encode domain logic in React instead of reading existing command/query/preview surfaces.
risks.mitigation: Writer must use existing read models and command submission boundaries; gameplay review checks product clarity before acceptance.

risks.summary: If confirmation only changes text, players still cannot tell whether the command succeeded.
risks.mitigation: Acceptance requires explicit submitted/accepted/rejected or pending states and disabled/changed duplicate-submission affordance.

requested_action: Implement the bounded core action-loop UX recovery and return a validated writer handoff for gameplay review.
